name: Red Currant-Glazed Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 Pork Loin Chops, about 4 oz. each
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from chops.
2. Sprinkle sage, pepper, and salt on both sides of the chops.
3. Coat a non-stick skillet with cooking spray and heat over medium until hot.
4. Add chops to the skillet and cook for 7 minutes on each side, or until done. Remove chops and keep warm.
5. In the same skillet, add jelly and vinegar. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened (about 2 minutes).
6. Spoon the sauce over the chops.
